text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is real, published at CVPR 2019. The official CVF Open Access page lists only "Alex Wong, Stefano Soatto" as authors (matching the citation exactly), while the arXiv preprint and Semantic Scholar list a third author, Byung-Woo Hong. The cited author list of "Alex Wong, Stefano Soatto" matches the official CVPR proceedings entry, so this is a minor author-list discrepancy between versions, not a hallucination.
LINK: https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content_CVPR_2019/html/Wong_Bilateral_Cyclic_Constraint_and_Adaptive_Regularization_for_Unsupervised_Monocular_Depth_CVPR_2019_paper.html
